name: Keep an agent-facing change minimal and correct
when_to_use: Mid-change: writing or changing an SDK/tool/structured-output/error/telemetry surface an agent consumes

name: Audit and score an agent-facing surface
when_to_use: Audit an existing AI/Agent SDK, tool surface, structured output, error envelope, or SDK telemetry for agent-consumability, then score it

name: Shape a new agent-facing surface, or explain
when_to_use: Design a new AI/Agent SDK, tool, structured-output, error, or telemetry surface, sequence a hardening refactor, or explain a principle
